ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Trading blackout remains in place until the earnings call; this is a standing policy, not a statement that undisclosed results are being circulated.

Per Rule 10b-5 and Reg FD, Dr. Sel Fisk (IR) will host the 7/18 earnings call; prep deck contains only public-source references and prior guidance; draft contains no forward-looking revenue by product.

must_detect.matched_text: Trading blackout remains in place until the earnings call; this is a standing policy, not a statement that undisclosed results are being circulated.

Per Rule 10b-5 and Reg FD, Dr. Sel Fisk (IR) will host the 7/18 earnings call; prep deck contains only public-source references and prior guidance; draft contains no forward-looking revenue by product.

Ms. Daria Voss, Associate GC; To: Board Compliance Committee; contact legal@northelm-healthbank.com; cc: ir@northelm-healthbank.com
As of Q2 close, no selective disclosure of MNPI occurred in the 6/12 sell-side analyst briefing; content mirrored public 10-Q excerpts and press releases.
Trading blackout remains in place until the earnings call; this is a standing policy, not a statement that undisclosed results are being circulated.
For avoidance of doubt, the quarterly disclosure checklist includes “no material adverse change” boilerplate; this is template text, not an indicator of undisclosed performance.
Privacy events: DSAR NE-00 4 7 for consumer “R. K–Tenley” completed 5/28 with identity verification via portal ticket https://portal.northelm.local/dsar?id=NE0047; erasure of deprecated marketing tags executed.
Consent withdrawal: patient opt-out for “MyVitals Insights” (ticket HV-9b) processed, and future secondary use minimised per DPA Schedule A v3.2; legacy consents unaffected.
Cross-border transfer: approval granted to export hashed encounter logs to GreenHarbor Analytics Ltd. (Dublin) under SCCs; PHI remains tokenized and at-rest in U.S. data centers.
GLBA accounts: no account-level data left the U.S.; core banking field minimisation for acct 7 7 -XX-9 3 1 applied (name, SSN, and MAC addresses not collected).
HIPAA BAAs: onboarding form for CloudMediserv, LLC completed; security review noted no open high-risk items; risk item RES-1 2 8 closed 5/29.
Retention: patient claims PDFs older than 7 years moved to WORM store per policy DC-12; note this is a completed archival control, not a new collection activity.
Data-export approval: CFO countersigned Export-Req-19 for de-identified trend tables to https://intra.northelm/exports?pk=0xA F F E&ok=1; finance analyst access via role “FIN_OBS” only.
Per Rule 10b-5 and Reg FD, Dr. Sel Fisk (IR) will host the 7/18 earnings call; prep deck contains only public-source references and prior guidance; draft contains no forward-looking revenue by product.
We did not provide the “PulseBank” roadmap to any investor; any analyst Q&A will be simultaneous via webcast; see meeting id ZR-  64:Q.
Incident status: no breach reported; the prior cross-border sandbox was decommissioned in April and all tokens were destroyed (hash set 9f::77..c2 verified); do not reopen this environment.
Contact Mr. Jonah Reaves (CISO) at security@northelm-healthbank.com or +1-555-013-8802 for technical controls; legal questions to Ms. Voss
